body_transformation: The rounded head now features a smooth, deep ocean blue cap with subtle aquamarine ripples, replacing the mushroom texture with a glossy, water-slick surface. The pink body transitions to a pearlescent teal with faint seafoam green highlights along the limbs, maintaining the compact silhouette. The curled tail tip transforms into a streamlined fin with a gentle wave pattern, while the dark blue accents become smooth, scale-like markings along the legs. Webbed feet replace the stubby legs, preserving the quadruped stance with a sleek, aquatic texture.
signature_feature: Mushroom cap: smooth, deep ocean blue with aquamarine ripples and pearly sheen.
